name: SANDRIDGE ENERGY INC
summary: GENERAL We are an independent oil and natural gas company, organized in 2006, with a principal focus on acquisition, development and production activities in the U.S. Mid-Continent. As of December31, 2025, we had an interest in 1,446 gross (825 net) producing wells, approximately 930 of which we operate, and 574,599 gross (378,537 net) total acres under lease.
